title: NoWeather
description: Disables changing the weather from sunny to rain with multiple world support.
body:
# About Disables changing the weather from sunny to rain with multiple world support.

### Commands `v1.1.0` | Command | Description | Default | |-----------------------------|--------------------------------------------|---------| | `/noweather add ` | Adds a world to the disabled world list | `op` | | `/noweather remove ` | Removes a world to the disabled world list | `op` |
### Permissions `v1.1.0` | Command | Description | |-----------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | `noweather.admin` | Allows you to add and remove world in disabled world list |
# Installation 1. Download the latest version of NoWeather. 2. Put the .jar file on your `/plugins/` folder. 3. Restart your server.
